text: Which anime features Yor Forger?
explanation: Yor is secretly an assassin while posing as a family mother.

text: Which anime features Miyuki Shirogane?
explanation: Miyuki Shirogane is the student council president.

text: Which anime features Hori and Miyamura?
explanation: Horimiya follows the relationship between Hori and Miyamura.

text: Which anime features Taiga Aisaka?
explanation: Taiga is one of the central characters of Toradora!.

text: Which anime features Tohru Honda and the Sohma family?
explanation: Fruits Basket follows Tohru and the cursed Sohma family.

text: Which anime features Haruhi Fujioka?
explanation: Haruhi joins the Ouran Academy Host Club after breaking an expensive vase.

text: Which anime features Misaki Ayuzawa?
explanation: Misaki is the student council president who secretly works at a maid café.

text: Which anime features Sawako Kuronuma?
explanation: Sawako is a misunderstood student learning to connect with others.

text: Which anime features letters from the future sent to high school students?
explanation: Orange uses future letters to help prevent regret and tragedy.
